productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Navy Blue Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these leather shoes from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team this with chinos and simple shirts.UpperLeather upper for style and comfortLong tongue for easy wearStitch detailing for style and durabilityCollar lacing in leather for enhanced support to the collarLong collar for comfortable insertion and removal of footComplete inner nubuck lining for breathable comfortLeather footbed for all-day comfort and sweat protectionMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with horizontal grooves on the toe and back heel region, and with wave pattern lugs throughout for maximum grip and tractionshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
